allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path'],t['type']\) for t in d['tree']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
